prestazioni: Engine: M44/43 (3.0L inline-4, 9.0:1 compression) with a custom Schrick 284° camshaft kit (intake/exhaust) paired with titanium retainers from Mahle Motorsport to handle increased valve lift and RPM potential (safe to 7,800 RPM).

Forced induction: Single-turbo setup using a Garrett GT3582R (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by IPD, mated to a GReddy Type-S intercooler (front-mount, 22x6x3.5 inches) and a Bosch 044 fuel pump with dual Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pumps for E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain: 968 CS-specific 6-speed manual transmission reinforced with a Guard Industries limited-slip differential (40% lockup) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (paddle-type, 700 Nm torque capacity) with a lightweight aluminum flywheel (4.5 kg) from Spec Clutch.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) 968 CS-specific kit (Pandem-style overfenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and a ducktail spoiler with adjustable Gurney flap).

Wheels: BBS RS-GT1 17x9.5 (front) and 17x11 (rear) with custom offsets (+15mm front, +5mm rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 285/35/17 rear) on OZ Racing Ultra Leggera III wheel bolts.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Recaro (CS-specific Sportster CS seats with integrated 4-point Schroth Profi II harnesses), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede), and a custom aluminum shift knob by BBI Autosport (weighted, 968 CS-specific pattern).
